# No Magic Guarantees but Hard Loop

The system can guarantee behavior, not market obedience.

## Guaranteed by system

- campaign packet creation,
- tactic selection,
- math model selection,
- measurement plan,
- posterior update,
- failure autopsy,
- memory update.

## Not guaranteed by any honest system

- that a weak product sells,
- that a tiny market expands,
- that a bad offer converts,
- that platforms provide cheap traffic forever,
- that customers trust unsupported claims.

## Operating stance

```text
Do not guarantee the market.
Guarantee relentless modeled adaptation.
```
